# For software/hardware bugs

---
name: 🐛 Code or Telemetry Bug Report
about: Report data pipeline or firmware parsing failures.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug, software
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the software error or sensor fault is.

**Console Logs / Error Messages**
```text
Paste your terminal trace or compiler logs here
```

**System State Environment**
- Python/Arduino IDE Version: [e.g., Python 3.11]
- Input File Name: [e.g., layer_001_telemetry.csv]

**Expected Behavior**
What the data pipeline or motor trigger should have done physically.
